identity: Gaunt human male necromancer, sunken cheeks, pale greenish-grey skin, long stringy black hair, glowing pale-green eyes, skeletal slender build.
outfit: Tattered black-and-deep-purple floor-length robes with bone fragments sewn into the hems and shoulders, a high collar, bone finger-rings. Black leather belt with skull-shaped clasp. Barefoot.
weapons: A black-iron staff topped with a horned human skull, the skull's eye sockets glowing pale green, held in the right hand.
attackStyle: East-facing. Staff thrust forward, a stream of sickly green skull-energy erupting from the skull-top toward the right.
spellStyle: East-facing. Staff planted, free hand raised high with a swirling cloud of green skulls and bone fragments circling it.
blockStyle: East-facing. Staff held diagonally in front, a translucent sickly-green bone-shield forming beside it.
koStyle: East-facing, crumpled on the ground, staff fallen beside him, stringy hair splayed. Skull-top crystal dimmed.
southStyle: Facing camera (south), ominous idle. Staff planted by his side, free hand held up with glowing green fingertips. Pale green eye-glow.
portraitStyle: Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. Gaunt face, glowing pale-green eyes, bone-studded black robes visible.

referenceSheet.prompt:
IDENTITY (this image becomes the canonical identity anchor — preserve in every downstream frame): Gaunt human male necromancer, sunken cheeks, pale greenish-grey skin, long stringy black hair, glowing pale-green eyes, skeletal slender build.

OUTFIT: Tattered black-and-deep-purple floor-length robes with bone fragments sewn into the hems and shoulders, a high collar, bone finger-rings. Black leather belt with skull-shaped clasp. Barefoot.

WEAPONS: A black-iron staff topped with a horned human skull, the skull's eye sockets glowing pale green, held in the right hand.

CLASS: humanoid. Full-body view, head to feet visible. Character occupies ~70% of the canvas height. Feet aligned near the bottom; headroom above.

POSE: full-body side profile facing right (east), calm combat-ready idle. Head up, eyes visible. NOT a portrait bust, NOT a close-up — entire character from head to feet.

STYLE: detailed pixel art with clean readable silhouette, warm pixel-art palette, transparent background, no ground shadow.

portrait.prompt:
IDENTITY (must match reference sheet exactly): Gaunt human male necromancer, sunken cheeks, pale greenish-grey skin, long stringy black hair, glowing pale-green eyes, skeletal slender build.

OUTFIT: Tattered black-and-deep-purple floor-length robes with bone fragments sewn into the hems and shoulders, a high collar, bone finger-rings. Black leather belt with skull-shaped clasp. Barefoot.

WEAPONS: A black-iron staff topped with a horned human skull, the skull's eye sockets glowing pale green, held in the right hand.

POSE (portrait): Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. Gaunt face, glowing pale-green eyes, bone-studded black robes visible.

FRAMING: bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view, centered in a 256x256 canvas, shoulders fill the lower third.

SCALE (non-negotiable): character must occupy approximately 180px of the 256px canvas height — roughly 70%. Do NOT stretch or upscale. Extra space above head and/or below feet is correct.

STYLE: pixel art, transparent background, no ground shadow, no borders, no text. Match the palette and style of the reference sheet.

NEGATIVE: do not add weapons or props not listed in WEAPONS. Do not change palette, species, or outfit from the reference sheet. Do not zoom in — respect SCALE.
